metadata.description: azd environment name == stack prefix (must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{0,11}$), e.g. chkpmcp.
Region hosting BOTH Foundry Hosted Agents and Claude starter-kit accounts (July 2026 overlap).
Object id of the deploying user (azd injects AZURE_PRINCIPAL_ID). Empty skips deployer role grants.

Principal type of the deployer for the role assignments. azd runs as a signed-in User by default; CI deploying under a service principal MUST pass ServicePrincipal (azd env set AZURE_PRINCIPAL_TYPE ServicePrincipal) so ARM skips the AAD replication check correctly and avoids PrincipalNotFound.

Organization name sent to Anthropic via modelProviderData; Bicep deploys auto-accept the Anthropic commercial terms. Optional (default empty) so a gpt-only test stack (deployClaudeModels:false) validates without it; deploy.py enforces it for the anthropic path.
2-letter ISO country code sent to Anthropic.
Industry sent to Anthropic -- MUST be a lowercase enum value.
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute (GlobalStandard sku).
Also deploy claude-haiku-4-5 as the cheaper fallback deployment. Mapped to DEPLOY_FALLBACK_MODEL (azd env set to change).
Deploy the Claude (Anthropic) model deployments. Mapped to DEPLOY_CLAUDE_MODELS. A test/azure-openai deploy sets this false so no Claude deployment is attempted on an ineligible subscription.
Deploy the first-party Azure OpenAI test deployment (gpt-5-mini). Mapped to DEPLOY_OPENAI_MODEL. First-party, so it deploys on credit/MSDN/Dev-Test subscriptions where Claude is blocked.
Deployment name (== model name) for the Azure OpenAI test model. Mapped to OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME.
Model version for the Azure OpenAI test model. Mapped to OPENAI_MODEL_VERSION (gpt-5-mini GA text version).
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute for the Azure OpenAI test model (GlobalStandard). Mapped to OPENAI_CAPACITY.

Public network access for the credential Key Vault. Enabled (default) keeps the operator-run deploy/creds flow working; Disabled restricts to trusted Azure services + private networking. Mapped to KEY_VAULT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ACCESS.
Log Analytics workspace name (log-<prefix>-<resourceToken>).
Application Insights component name (appi-<prefix>-<resourceToken>).
Azure region for both resources.
Tags applied to every resource in the stack.
Key Vault name (kv-<prefix>-<resourceToken>, trimmed to 24 chars).
Azure region for the vault.
Tags applied to every resource in the stack.

Public network access for the vault. Defaults to Enabled because the CLI seeds/updates the per-server credential secrets from the OPERATOR machine (deploy, creds apply) over the internet. Set Disabled (or wire a private endpoint) when the vault is only reached from inside Azure -- the agent identity reaches it via the AzureServices bypass either way. Mapped to KEY_VAULT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ACCESS.
Registry name (acr<prefix-no-hyphens><resourceToken>, alphanumeric, trimmed to 50 chars).
Azure region for the registry.
Tags applied to every resource in the stack.
Foundry account name (<prefix>-foundry-<resourceToken>); also the custom subdomain.
Foundry project name (<prefix>-project).
Azure region for the account and project.
Tags applied to every resource in the stack.
Organization name sent to Anthropic via modelProviderData.
2-letter ISO country code sent to Anthropic.
Industry sent to Anthropic -- must be a lowercase enum value.
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute (GlobalStandard).
Also deploy claude-haiku-4-5 as the cheaper fallback deployment.
Deploy the Claude (Anthropic) model deployments. Set false for a test/azure-openai stack so no Claude deployment is attempted on an ineligible subscription.
Deploy the first-party Azure OpenAI test deployment (gpt-5-mini). Set true for a cheap test stack on a credit/MSDN/Dev-Test subscription.
Deployment name (== model name) for the first-party Azure OpenAI test model.
Model version for the first-party Azure OpenAI test model (gpt-5-mini GA text version).
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute for the Azure OpenAI test model (GlobalStandard).
False = account + project only (phase 1); true = also the model deployments (phase 2).
Object id of the deploying user/SP (azd injects AZURE_PRINCIPAL_ID). Empty skips the deployer grants.

Principal type of the deployer, forwarded from main.bicep (mapped to AZURE_PRINCIPAL_TYPE, default User). CI deploying under a service principal must set it to ServicePrincipal so ARM skips the AAD replication check for the freshly-created SP and avoids PrincipalNotFound.
Principal id of the Foundry PROJECT system-assigned managed identity (pulls the agent image).
Foundry account name (role scope for model inference + agent management).
Key Vault name (role scope for the Check Point credential secrets).
Container registry name (role scope for image push/pull).
Foundry account name (<prefix>-foundry-<resourceToken>); also the custom subdomain.
Foundry project name (<prefix>-project).
Azure region for the account and project.
Tags applied to every resource in the stack.
Organization name sent to Anthropic via modelProviderData.
2-letter ISO country code sent to Anthropic.
Industry sent to Anthropic -- must be a lowercase enum value.
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute (GlobalStandard).
Also deploy claude-haiku-4-5 as the cheaper fallback deployment.
Deploy the Claude (Anthropic) model deployments. Set false for a test/azure-openai stack so no Claude deployment is attempted on an ineligible subscription.
Deploy the first-party Azure OpenAI test deployment (gpt-5-mini). Set true for a cheap test stack on a credit/MSDN/Dev-Test subscription.
Deployment name (== model name) for the first-party Azure OpenAI test model.
Model version for the first-party Azure OpenAI test model (gpt-5-mini GA text version).
Per-deployment capacity in thousands of tokens-per-minute for the Azure OpenAI test model (GlobalStandard).
False = account + project only (phase 1); true = also the model deployments (phase 2).
